title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 78.575 - Form for submission of the question — repeal or amendment of ordinances adopted by initiative and referendum
text:
78.575.  Form for submission of the question — repeal or amendment of ordinances adopted by initiative and referendum. — 1.  The question shall be submitted in substantially the following form:
  2.  Any ordinance proposed by petition, or which is adopted by a vote of the people, cannot be repealed or amended by the council for a period of two years after the adoption of the ordinance except by a unanimous vote of all members of the council.  Any number of proposed ordinances may be voted upon at the same election.  The council may submit a proposition for the repeal of any such ordinance or for amendments thereto, to be voted upon at any municipal election.  Should the proposition receive a majority of the votes cast thereon, it shall be repealed or amended accordingly.
(L. 1984 S.B. 632)
